subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath brought forth, in the realm of being, from the unseen worlds, a luminous and steadfast Reality that doth overflow with grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انشا فی عالم الکیان غیب الاکوان حقیقه ثابته نورانیه فائضه علی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @imagery in the Qur'an, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
